create database FYP_StudentJob;

use FYP_StudentJob;

GRANT ALL ON *.* TO 'root'@'localhost';

FLUSH PRIVILEGES;

CREATE TABLE User
(Username varchar(20) not null,
Password varchar(20) not null,
Date_Created date not null,
Acc_type varchar(20) not null,
ProfileID varchar(10) not null,
Primary Key(Username));

DESC user;

CREATE TABLE Profile
(ProfileID varchar(10) not null,
ProfilePic longBLOB not null,
FirstName varchar(20) not null,
LastName varchar(20) not null,
GeneralSkill_Category varchar(50) not null,
AboutMe text not null,
CollegeName varchar(50) null,
CourseName varchar(50) null,
primary key(ProfileID));

DESC Profile;

CREATE TABLE Profile_Contact
(ProfileId varchar(10) not null,
ContactType varchar(40) not null,
ContactInfo text not null,
primary key(profileid, ContactType));

DESC profile_Contact;


CREATE TABLE Profile_SoftwareSkill
(ProfileID varchar(10) not null,
SoftwareSkillID varchar(10) not null,
SoftwareName varchar(70) not null,
SkillLevel int(1) not null,
primary key(ProfileID, SoftwareSkillID));

DESC Profile_SoftwareSkill;

CREATE TABLE Profile_Portfolio
(ProfileID varchar(10) not null,
Portfolio_ID varchar(10) not null,
PortfolioType varchar(20) not null,
PortfolioPicture longblob not null,
Description text not null,
PortfolioUrl text not null,
primary key(ProfileId, Portfolio_ID));

DESC Profile_Portfolio;

CREATE TABLE Employer_HiringPost
(HirePostID varchar(10) not null,
Username varchar(20) not null,
Title Text not null,
Description text not null,
JobType varchar(30) not null,
Offers varchar(20) not null,
DateTime_Posted datetime not null,
Post_SkillCategory varchar(30) not null,
Location text null,
WorkingHours text null,
PostStatus text null,
Primary key(HirePostID));

DESC Employer_HiringPost;

CREATE TABLE Employer_HiringPost_Picture
(HirePostID varchar(10) not null,
PicId varchar(10) not null,
Picture LongBlob not null,
Primary Key(HirePostID, Picid));

DESC Employer_HiringPost_Picture;


CREATE TABLE Hiring_Post_Pending_Request
(HirePostID varchar(10) not null,
RequestDateTime datetime not null,
RequesterUsername varchar(30) not null,
Message text not null,
Status varchar(10) not null,
Status_added_dateTime datetime null,
Primary key(HirePostID, RequesterUsername));

DESC Hiring_Post_Pending_Request;

CREATE TABLE Hiring_Post_Interview_Request
(HirePostID varchar(10) not null,
RequestDateTime datetime null,
RequesterUsername varchar(30) not null,
Message text null,
Date text null,
Time varchar(20) null,
Location text null,
Status varchar(40) null,
Status_added_dateTime datetime null,
Primary key(HirePostID, RequesterUsername));

CREATE TABLE Users_NotificationToken
(Username varchar(10) not null,
Token text not null,
Primary key(Username));

DESC Users_NotificationToken;


CREATE TABLE Chat_Room
(ChatRoomId varchar(10) not null,
user1 varchar(20) not null,
user2 varchar(20) not null,
Primary key(ChatRoomId));

CREATE TABLE Chat_Room_Message
(ChatRoomId varchar(10) not null,
messageID varchar(10) not null,
messageDateTime datetime not null,
msgfrom varchar(20) not null,
msgto varchar(20) not null,
message text not null,
Primary key(ChatRoomId, messageID));

select ehp.hirepostid, ehp.username, ehp.title, ehp.description, ehp.jobtype, ehp.offers, ehp.datetime_posted, ehp.post_skillcategory
from employer_hiringpost ehp
WHERE ehp.datetime_posted >'2019-4-15 12:10:30'
order by ehp.datetime_posted DESC
limit 0,10;

select ehp.hirepostid, hpp.requestdateTime, hpp.requesterUsername, hpp.message, hpp.status, hpi.requestDateTime, hpi.requesterUsername, hpi.message, hpi.date, hpi.time, hpi.location, hpi.status
from employer_hiringpost ehp, Hiring_Post_Pending_Request hpp, Hiring_Post_interview_Request hpi
where ehp.hirepostid=hpp.hirepostid and ehp.hirepostid=hpi.hirepostid and hpp.requesterUsername=hpi.requesterUsername and ehp.username='employer'
group by ehp.hirepostid, hpp.requesterUsername
order by ehp.hirepostid ASC, hpp.Status_added_dateTime DESC;


select ehp.hirepostid, hpp.requestdateTime, hpp.requesterUsername, p.firstname, p.lastname, p.profilepic, p.GeneralSkill_Category, hpp.message, hpp.status, hpi.requestDateTime, hpi.requesterUsername, hpi.message, hpi.date, hpi.time, hpi.location, hpi.status, hpp.Status_added_dateTime
from employer_hiringpost ehp, Hiring_Post_Pending_Request hpp, Hiring_Post_interview_Request hpi, profile p, user u
where ehp.hirepostid=hpp.hirepostid and ehp.hirepostid=hpi.hirepostid and hpp.requesterUsername=hpi.requesterUsername and ehp.username='employer' and u.username=hpp.requesterUsername and u.profileid=p.profileid and u.username=hpi.requesterUsername
group by ehp.hirepostid, hpp.requesterUsername
order by ehp.datetime_posted DESC, ehp.hirepostid DESC, hpp.Status_added_dateTime DESC;



select ehp.hirepostid, hpp.requestdateTime, hpp.message, hpp.status, hpi.requestDateTime, hpi.requesterUsername, hpi.message, hpi.date, hpi.time, hpi.location, hpi.status, hpp.Status_added_dateTime, p.profilepic, ehp_pic.picture, ehp.hirepostid, p.firstname, p.lastname, ehp.title, ehp.description, ehp.jobtype, ehp.offers, ehp.datetime_posted, ehp.location, ehp.workingHours, ehp.Post_SkillCategory
from employer_hiringpost ehp, Hiring_Post_Pending_Request hpp, Hiring_Post_interview_Request hpi, profile p, user u, employer_hiringpost_picture ehp_pic
where ehp.hirepostid=hpp.hirepostid and ehp.hirepostid=hpi.hirepostid and hpp.requesterUsername=hpi.requesterUsername and hpp.requesterUsername='student' and ehp.username=u.username and u.username=ehp.username and u.profileid=p.profileid and ehp_pic.hirepostid=ehp.hirepostid
group by ehp.hirepostid, hpp.requesterUsername
order by hpp.Status_added_dateTime DESC, ehp.hirepostid DESC;

select ehp.hirepostid, hppPro.firstname, hppPro.lastname, hpp.requestdateTime, hpp.message, hpp.status, hpi.requestDateTime, hpi.requesterUsername, hpi.message, hpi.date, hpi.time, hpi.location, hpi.status, hpp.Status_added_dateTime, p.profilepic, ehp_pic.picture, ehp.hirepostid, p.firstname, p.lastname, ehp.title, ehp.description, ehp.jobtype, ehp.offers, ehp.datetime_posted, ehp.location, ehp.workingHours, ehp.Post_SkillCategory
from employer_hiringpost ehp, Hiring_Post_Pending_Request hpp, Hiring_Post_interview_Request hpi, profile p, user u, employer_hiringpost_picture ehp_pic, profile hppPro, user hppuser
where ehp.hirepostid=hpp.hirepostid and ehp.hirepostid=hpi.hirepostid and hpp.requesterUsername=hpi.requesterUsername and hppPro.profileid=hppuser.profileid and hppuser.username=hpp.requesterusername and hpp.requesterUsername='student' and ehp.username=u.username and u.username=ehp.username and u.profileid=p.profileid and ehp_pic.hirepostid=ehp.hirepostid
group by ehp.hirepostid, hpp.requesterUsername
order by hpp.Status_added_dateTime DESC, ehp.hirepostid DESC;
